title: UPDATE....2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER ONLINE APPLICATION DATES HAVE BEEN EXTENDED UNTIL JULY 27, 2025.
content:
UPDATE

2025-2026 Fall Semester online application start date: June 2, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, July 27, 2025

Results Announcement Date: Tuesday, July 29, 2025

Main List Registration Deadlines: July 29-August 11, 2025
